feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)

entry.title: Sixteen and a Half
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,217Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: Diana's errand. Wanamaker's. Fiducci closes his other appointments. The collar that was twisted. The tie that didn't need straightening. Four hours of professional observation. Clark holds a measurement for three weeks and says so in a doorway. Inspired by: a comment from badlytimedsarcasm

entry.title: The Raven Roosts in the Cornflower Blue
entry.summary:
Author: Aurora2Sunset

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,301Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 159

Summary: Someone new moved to Smallville, in the house on the other side of the Kent farm. Clark meets the new kid, Bruce Wayne, and his first impression isn't great. He thinks that Bruce is spoiled and rude and out of place. Maybe that's why he blows up at him. But he still saves him when he's in trouble, that's just the kind of person that Clark is. After a while they develop a tentative kind of friendship over the summer. Bruce isn't like anyone else that Clark knows, and he feels connected to him in all of his out of place-ness. His own feelings for the other take him by surprise, he only hopes that he can stomp them down before he ruins their friendship over them. - Smallville AU where Bruce spends the summers there and befriends Clark long before either of them become superheroes.

entry.title: Black feathers of the night
entry.summary:
Author: Jesse29705

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,224Chapters: 8/8Kudos: 2

Summary: batman is missing as everyone is worried about it. all of the League of Justice know that he can take care of himself, but being gone for 1 week, something is very wrong, and Superman knows it. The bat family have been looking for him but with no luck as the only one that had seen batman was Superman himself, but that was one week ago. weeks passed, and nothing ever came, making Superman feel depressed and decided to fly back to his apartment to ease of his mind. while flying home, he felt a very weak, heartbeat, nearby as he decided to check it out only to encounter a injured Black Swan. (Meanwhile in the Multiverse] an evil sorcerer was teleporting in different dimensions looking for someone before arriving Batman's universe and caught a sight of his prize as his master plan will begin to take the throne And no one will get his way.

entry.title: I hate that I let this drag on so long, now I hate myself.
entry.summary:
Author: flyingmonkeys101

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,014Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 1

Summary: Clark and Bruce had briefly met before when they were pitted against each other while attending rival schools. It was the final match of the wrestling tournament when pressure was high and everyone's eyes were on them. Bruce loses to John by a small margin but the loss still stung as it was his senior year and the last match before the season ended. Going to college Bruce thought it would be a fresh new start. Nobody constantly reminding him of how the match ended and no nagging parents watching over his every move. Or so he thought. His roommate ends up being Clark, the same Clark who he lost his final match to. Their first meeting is awkward, and every meeting after that actually. But when tension starts to bubble, a proposal is made by one to the other, and a bit too much alcohol is involved. How will the pair deal with the relationship as it advances?

entry.title: Wings and Fangs: A Ladyhawke AU
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,249Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 4

Summary: Bruce Wayne becomes a hawk at sunrise. Kal-El becomes a wolf at sunset. Ninety seconds of overlap twice a day. Three years of this. They can see each other. Can't touch. Can't speak. Just run toward each other and fail, over and over, while their bodies break and the curse grinds them down to nothing. Ra's al Ghul built it to torture them. Punishment for refusing to serve. For loving each other. For being happy. Tim Drake finds them six months after everyone else gave up looking. He's wounded, obsessed, and the entire hero community thinks he's lost it. He doesn't care. With a guilt-ridden mage, a solar eclipse, and sheer bloody-minded determination, Tim is going to break an unbreakable curse. Even if it kills him. A Ladyhawke AU. Body horror. Transformation curses. Two legends reduced to beasts. And one Robin who refuses to let them suffer alone.

entry.title: HAIL MARY
entry.summary:
Author: sleepyteatimebear

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,937Chapters: 12/32Kudos: 84

Summary: Clark 'Superman' Kent, is a shoe-in for the NFL draft, a tall, dimpled, All-American-Type, College Football's Jesus. Bruce is well-known for his intense dedication to collegiate journalism, his all-black closet and the billions promised to him upon graduation. Bruce wants to sweep at the Collegiate Emmy's, Clark wants to go pro. So, they make a deal. Bruce can produce a media campaign that rallies the public behind Clark before Draft Day. Bruce helps to upkeep the Wayne Media Enterprise legacy, and Clark gets good press. But then, Clark and Bruce spend game-day after game-day together. Bruce asks Clark questions, studies him, captures him, writes all of him down. What's even more peculiar is Clark starts asking questions back. Questions that make Bruce feel like Clark wants to know him as more than just his shadow for the season. They can’t fall in love. It wouldn’t make practical sense. It wouldn’t make emotional sense. But couldn't it?

entry.title: Dark Days and Lost Suns
entry.summary:
Author: Athena_Faymont

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 242,356Chapters: 29/29Kudos: 292

Summary: Clark admires Batman, the man who has given up civilian life to protect everyone else's, the tough, sharp, and compassionate man. Bruce admires Superman, the alien who, despite being able to dominate them all by force, has decided to take care of a planet that isn't his own.And, even with these two flawed principles, neither of them can imagine how alone the other feels... and how alone they themselves are. This is a long story, the superbat fanfic I've always wanted to write about how, within the canon, one day something changes and they find each other. If you want to join me on this adventure, we'll be here every Friday! [Puedes encontrarlo en español en mi perfil.]

entry.summary:
Author: serephent

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,087Chapters: 1/5Kudos: 6

It doesn’t follow the game exactly because: Clark is there. Laws exist. Bruce isn't an idiot.)

entry.title: Even If We Both Break Down
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,965Chapters: 7/7Kudos: 64

Summary: Bruce Wayne is the world's greatest detective. He can solve any crime, track any criminal, predict any outcome. But when it comes to love, he only knows one equation: caring equals loss.Now Clark's patience is wearing thin, and Bruce is finally forced to confront what he's been cataloguing all along: you can't protect someone by making them feel worthless. Sometimes the only thing more terrifying than losing someone is realizing you're losing them by choice.A character study about apologizing, about learning to be present instead of perfect, and about two men figuring out that love isn't a tactical problem to be solved—it's a choice to be made, again and again, even when the math says it's safer to run.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Into Dust
entry.summary:
Author: SoupofTime

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,519Chapters: 1/5Kudos: 2

Summary: The hopeless kingdom of Aurelion is doomed to fall at the hands of the demon horde looming ever close by the day, by the night rather. What will the last standing knight and the kingdoms creature, which haunts the manor on the west hill, do against a war long lost at its arrival.   or Superman and Batman gothic Dracula inspired story. Got the idea from the song "Only us" by the Miracle of sound+Karliene.The themes of each chapter match with a lyric from the song but not exactly in order.Superman is a Knight unknowing of his power, and Batman is a gargoyle like creature/protector of his manor.

entry.title: Can You Get Up Off Your Knees?
entry.summary:
Author: Gotham_Blight

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,935Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 63

Summary: Kal wants nothing more than to devour Bruce. There's a simple pleasure to taking apart the fearsome Dark Knight and putting him back together again. If only Bruce would embrace his role under Kal's thumb. He'd make such a pretty pet, after all. That's alright. Kal's more than willing to break him down piece by piece, until he's a sweet, mewling little thing. *Can be read standalone*

entry.title: If you want my bones, I shall give them to you
entry.summary:
Author: The_True_Reader

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,486Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 87

Summary: When a twenty-one year old Peter Parker died, he thought he'd at least get to complain to whatever God there was for his sorry life. He didn't expect to wake up in a cold, rainy, and unfamiliar place. He really didn't expect to be kidnapped immediately either. So, an average Tuesday in Peter Parker's life. --- Or, because I suck at summaries: Another typical Peter Parker in Gotham fic, except things aren't as typical as you would expect, and something feels really wrong.

entry.title: Every Billionaire has his Boy Scout Boyfriend and Adopted Acrobat Son
entry.summary:
Author: ChaosQueen1015

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,638Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 44

Summary: Thanos won and next thing Peter knows is he's lying on the ground of some strange city called Metropolis. Not 24 hours later he's been adopted by Clark Kent also known as Superman and is figuring out how to manage this new world and redevelop his hero identity, all while working with his new best friend, Dick Grayson, to figure out how to get their dads together.

entry.title: Agape, Pouring Out Of Me In Floods
entry.summary:
Author: NotCassia

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,239Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 123

Summary: He hadn't been actively looking at the billboards—he didn't make a habit of it while flying. He'd say it was mostly coincidence he'd even manage to come across it, but it had halted him mid flight regardless. He hadn't thought they'd use that shot for the billboard. Hell, he had thought he'd made sure it was unusable. Theatric and comical—anything but the cold, beautiful shot the crew had been looking for. But here it was, spanning the complete width and length of the billboard, Clark pressing a tender kiss to the space just next to Bruce's eye, just over his cheek. Holding him close with two arms snaked at his waist. Or >Anna@getannabortion everybody who's been praying on the downfall of this relationship lowkey suffering rn😭🥀 [an official promotional picture of Bruce in Clark's embrace, at the whims of his comical kiss—advertised by Vogue and Wayne Enterprises]37k likes 31 replies   >Supergirl's Wench@supergirl_swench #CRUCE SUPREMACY!!!🥳🥳🎉 [a picture of the viral Cruce photoshoot displayed on a digital billboard, taken in Gotham Square]78k likes 109 replies

entry.title: Two Months In Kansas
entry.summary:
Author: Superbat_fan02

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,309Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 17

Summary: Alfred forces Bruce to spend two months on vacation in Kansas, a small, sparsely populated town, to give him a break from his grueling training and the mental exhaustion of spending almost every night at his computer reading thousands of Gotham police reports. On this short trip, Bruce meets Clark, a boy a year younger than him who is his complete opposite. Clark is cheerful, honest, empathetic, and responsible. The golden boy of Kansas, always with a smile and a pleasant tone of voice. But Bruce doesn’t believe that’s the whole story. Clark lives on and grew up on the farm where there are reports of a UFO crash, and, mysteriously, his “parents”—who weren’t parents at the time—are now his parents. Was it really a coincidence that Clark appeared after this supposed UFO news? Furthermore, not to mention that Bruce was already considered tall and well-built for his age, Clark was even taller and bigger than him. He always seemed to hear more than he intended to, or would carelessly lift objects that would be a challenge even for adults to lift. Bruce was sure of it—there was something about Clark, and he wanted to find out what it was.
